steps.title: Read a clear point off the graph
steps.content: The line crosses the $y$-axis at the point $(0,2)$, an easy lattice point to read.

steps.title: Substitute and solve for B
steps.content: Plug $(0,2)$ into $10x+By=50$: $$10(0)+B(2)=50 \Rightarrow 2B=50 \Rightarrow B=25.$$ That matches the correct answer — A is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above is 25, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore A is correct.
